category_sources: source_facts.description says checks Java source against a coding standard; official README says Checkstyle helps programmers write Java code that adheres to a coding standard.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub README use Checkstyle; source_facts.name is checkstyle.
docs_sources: Official Checkstyle site provides documentation navigation, configuration docs, running docs, and standard checks reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/checkstyle/checkstyle; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Java coding-standard checks; official GitHub topics include java, static-code-analysis, static-analysis, code-quality, and command-line-tool.
